creator: jason-dated-1005015806.786bbb@mastaler.com
text:
FUJISHIMA Satsuki <sf@FreeBSD.org> writes:

> Hi, I slitely modified your patch:
> o add libid3tag/configure to LIBTOOLFILES.
> o build/install madtime, a small and useful utility. I use it for a long time.
> 
> If you don't have problem, I'd like to commit it.

No problem, please commit.
